requirement_topic.en: Noise Declaration for Power Tools: No Philippine Outdoor-Noise Marking Equivalent to the EU, Versus China GB/T Noise Test References
requirement_topic.zh: 电动工具噪声声明：菲律宾无类似欧盟的户外噪声标识，对比中国GB/T噪声检测引用
requirement_topic.zht: 電動工具噪聲聲明：菲律賓無類似歐盟的戶外噪聲標識，對比中國GB/T噪聲檢測引用

summary.en: The Philippines does not operate an outdoor equipment noise-emission marking scheme equivalent to the EU guaranteed sound power label, so there is no mandatory LWA noise mark on the tool for placement on the Philippine market. Noise instead appears as occupational and environmental obligations: workplace noise exposure limits enforced under the Occupational Safety and Health Standards by DOLE, and ambient or community noise controlled by DENR and local government, which fall on the user and employer rather than as a product label. Manufacturers may still declare a noise and vibration figure in the manual per the IEC 62841 test methods, and that declaration is useful but is not a Philippine conformity mark.
summary.zh: 菲律宾不设类似欧盟保证声功率标签的户外设备噪声排放标识方案，故工具在菲律宾市场投放无强制LWA噪声标识。噪声转而表现为职业与环境义务：由DOLE依据职业安全健康标准执行的工作场所噪声暴露限值，以及由DENR和地方政府管控的环境或社区噪声，这些落在使用者和雇主身上而非作为产品标签。制造商仍可按IEC 62841检测方法在说明书中声明噪声和振动数值，该声明有用但并非菲律宾合规标识。
summary.zht: 菲律賓不設類似歐盟保證聲功率標籤的戶外設備噪聲排放標識方案，故工具在菲律賓市場投放無強制LWA噪聲標識。噪聲轉而表現為職業與環境義務：由DOLE依據職業安全健康標準執行的工作場所噪聲暴露限值，以及由DENR和地方政府管控的環境或社區噪聲，這些落在使用者和僱主身上而非作為產品標籤。製造商仍可按IEC 62841檢測方法在說明書中聲明噪聲和振動數值，該聲明有用但並非菲律賓合規標識。

standards_or_laws: No Philippine outdoor-equipment noise-emission product marking equivalent to the EU guaranteed sound power label
DOLE Occupational Safety and Health Standards workplace noise exposure limits (user and employer obligation)
DENR and local government ambient and community noise controls
Optional noise and vibration declaration in the manual per IEC 62841 test methods

summary.en: China likewise has no outdoor-equipment guaranteed sound power product mark; power tool noise and vibration are characterised in the GB/T 3883 series test methods and related GB/T acoustic and vibration standards, primarily for declaration in the manual and for occupational noise management under Chinese workplace rules. The China position therefore aligns with the Philippines in that there is no EU-style noise marking, only test-method declaration plus occupational and environmental noise law.
summary.zh: 中国同样无户外设备保证声功率产品标识；电动工具噪声和振动按GB/T 3883系列检测方法及相关GB/T声学和振动标准表征，主要用于说明书声明及中国工作场所规则下的职业噪声管理。因此中国立场与菲律宾一致，即无欧盟式噪声标识，仅有检测方法声明加职业与环境噪声法。
summary.zht: 中國同樣無戶外設備保證聲功率產品標識；電動工具噪聲和振動按GB/T 3883系列檢測方法及相關GB/T聲學和振動標準表徵，主要用於說明書聲明及中國工作場所規則下的職業噪聲管理。因此中國立場與菲律賓一致，即無歐盟式噪聲標識，僅有檢測方法聲明加職業與環境噪聲法。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3883 series noise and vibration test methods
Related GB/T acoustic and vibration emission standards
Chinese workplace occupational noise management rules

gap.en: The practical gap is the opposite of most rows: there is no extra Philippine noise mark to obtain, so an exporter familiar with the EU outdoor noise directive should not assume a similar label is needed here. The exporter should carry over the IEC 62841 noise and vibration declaration into the manual, ensure figures are honest and reproducible, and leave workplace and community noise compliance to the Philippine user and employer under DOLE and DENR rules.
gap.zh: 实际差距与多数行相反：菲律宾没有额外的噪声标识需要取得，故熟悉欧盟户外噪声指令的出口商不应假定此处需要类似标签。出口商应将IEC 62841噪声和振动声明沿用至说明书，确保数值真实可复现，并将工作场所和社区噪声合规交由菲律宾使用者和雇主依DOLE与DENR规则承担。
gap.zht: 實際差距與多數行相反：菲律賓沒有額外的噪聲標識需要取得，故熟悉歐盟戶外噪聲指令的出口商不應假定此處需要類似標籤。出口商應將IEC 62841噪聲和振動聲明沿用至說明書，確保數值真實可復現，並將工作場所和社區噪聲合規交由菲律賓使用者和僱主依DOLE與DENR規則承擔。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory product noise mark for power tools in the Philippines; occupational noise limits (DOLE) and ambient noise controls (DENR and local government) are mandatory on users and employers, not on the product as a label
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory product noise mark; GB/T noise test methods used for declaration and occupational noise rules apply to workplaces

source.publisher: Occupational Safety and Health Center, Department of Labor and Employment (Philippines)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, the Philippines has no outdoor-equipment noise marking for power tools; the exporter should not seek a noise label, should carry the IEC 62841 noise and vibration declaration into the manual, and should treat workplace and community noise as DOLE and DENR user-side obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，菲律宾对电动工具无户外设备噪声标识；出口商不应寻求噪声标签，应将IEC 62841噪声和振动声明纳入说明书，并将工作场所和社区噪声视为DOLE与DENR的使用方义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，菲律賓對電動工具無戶外設備噪聲標識；出口商不應尋求噪聲標籤，應將IEC 62841噪聲和振動聲明納入說明書，並將工作場所和社區噪聲視為DOLE與DENR的使用方義務。
